title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Saturday, March 7
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 7.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 3월 7일자 정답을 제공하는 기사입니다. CNET에서 게임 관련 콘텐츠로 발행되었습니다. 퍼즐 게임에 대한 일반적인 정보 제공 목적의 기사입니다.
summary_en: This article provides answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle for March 7th. It was published by CNET as gaming-related content. The article serves as a general information resource for puzzle game enthusiasts.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드에게 직접적인 비즈니스 시사점은 없는 일반 게임 콘텐츠입니다.
so_what_en: This general gaming content offers no direct business implications for D2C brands.
key_points: NYT Mini Crossword answers for March 7
Gaming content from CNET
General entertainment information

title: Kids Online Safety Act Advances to House Amid Concerns Over Free Speech and Civil Rights
description: Critics of the act say measures like age verification could have harmful effects.
summary_ko: 아동 온라인 안전법이 하원으로 넘어갔지만 언론 자유와 시민권 침해 우려가 제기되고 있습니다. 연령 확인 등의 조치가 해로운 영향을 미칠 수 있다고 비판자들이 지적했습니다. 인터넷 익명성 종료 가능성에 대한 논쟁이 계속되고 있습니다.
summary_en: The Kids Online Safety Act has advanced to the House amid concerns over free speech and civil rights violations. Critics argue that measures like age verification could have harmful effects. The debate continues over potential end of internet anonymity.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 향후 온라인 연령 확인 요구사항과 프라이버시 규제 변화에 대비해 고객 데이터 수집 및 마케팅 전략을 재검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prepare for potential age verification requirements and privacy regulation changes by reviewing customer data collection and marketing strategies.
key_points: Kids Online Safety Act advances to House
Age verification concerns raised
Free speech and civil rights implications
Internet anonymity debate

title: From Teacher to Fashion Brand Founder
description:
In 2019 Nasrin Jafari was a middle school teacher in New York City. "I had no idea how to make clothes," she says.
The post From Teacher to Fashion Brand Founder appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 2019년 뉴욕의 중학교 교사였던 나스린 자파리가 패션 브랜드 창업자로 변신한 스토리입니다. 그녀는 의류 제작에 대한 지식이 전혀 없었다고 말했습니다. 교사에서 패션 브랜드 창업자로의 전환 과정을 다룬 기사입니다.
summary_en: This story follows Nasrin Jafari's transformation from a middle school teacher in New York City in 2019 to a fashion brand founder. She admits having no knowledge of how to make clothes initially. The article covers her journey from education to fashion entrepreneurship.
so_what_ko: 기존 경력과 무관한 분야에서도 D2C 패션 브랜드 창업이 가능하다는 사례로, 열정과 학습 의지가 있다면 누구나 도전할 수 있음을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: This case demonstrates that D2C fashion brand entrepreneurship is possible even without relevant background, showing anyone with passion and willingness to learn can succeed.
key_points: Teacher-to-entrepreneur transformation
Fashion brand founding without prior experience
Career pivot success story

title: Costco to flow tariff refunds, ‘if and when’ received, back to customers
description: CEO Ron Vachris said Thursday that the warehouse club retailer is committed to returning any potential refunds to its customers through “lower prices and better values.”
summary_ko: 코스트코가 관세 환급금을 받을 경우 고객에게 되돌려주겠다고 발표했습니다. 론 바크리스 CEO는 목요일 창고형 소매업체가 잠재적 환급금을 '더 낮은 가격과 더 나은 가치'를 통해 고객에게 돌려주기로 약속했다고 말했습니다. 고객 중심의 가격 정책을 유지하겠다는 의지를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Costco announced it will pass tariff refunds back to customers if and when received. CEO Ron Vachris stated Thursday that the warehouse retailer is committed to returning potential refunds through 'lower prices and better values.' This demonstrates their commitment to customer-centric pricing policies.
so_what_ko: 대형 소매업체의 고객 중심 가격 정책은 D2C 브랜드에게 고객 신뢰 구축과 가격 투명성의 중요성을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Large retailers' customer-centric pricing policies highlight the importance of building customer trust and price transparency for D2C brands.
key_points: Costco commits to passing tariff refunds to customers
Customer-centric pricing strategy
Commitment to lower prices and better values

title: The Weekly Closeout: Levi’s closes Dockers sale and Chip Wilson escalates Lululemon battle
description: The jeans maker has officially handed over its khaki label to Authentic Brands Group. Meanwhile, Lululemon’s founder strikes again.
summary_ko: 리바이스가 도커스 브랜드 매각을 오센틱 브랜즈 그룹에게 공식 완료했습니다. 한편 룰루레몬 창립자 칩 윌슨이 회사와의 갈등을 계속 이어가고 있습니다. 청바지 제조업체가 카키 레이블 브랜드를 공식적으로 인수하게 되었습니다.
summary_en: Levi's has officially completed the sale of its Dockers brand to Authentic Brands Group. Meanwhile, Lululemon founder Chip Wilson continues his battle with the company. The jeans maker has officially handed over its khaki label brand.
so_what_ko: 브랜드 포트폴리오 정리와 창립자와의 갈등 사례는 D2C 브랜드가 성장 과정에서 직면할 수 있는 전략적 의사결정과 지배구조 이슈를 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Brand portfolio consolidation and founder conflicts illustrate strategic decisions and governance issues D2C brands may face during growth.
key_points: Levi's completes Dockers sale to Authentic Brands Group
Lululemon founder continues company battle
Brand portfolio restructuring

title: Gap revival crystallizes as sales jump 8% in Q4
description: The brand also notched its eighth straight comp rise. Tariffs eroded Gap Inc.’s margins and profits, though, and Athleta sales tanked again.
summary_ko: Gap 브랜드가 4분기 매출 8% 증가하며 부활 신호를 보였습니다. 8분기 연속 동일매장 매출 증가를 기록했으나 관세로 인해 마진과 이익이 감소했습니다. Athleta 브랜드는 계속해서 매출 부진을 보였습니다.
summary_en: Gap brand showed revival signs with Q4 sales jumping 8% year-over-year. The brand achieved its eighth consecutive quarter of comparable sales growth, though tariffs impacted margins and profits. Athleta brand continued to struggle with declining sales performance.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드도 일관된 성장 전략과 브랜드 포지셔닝 개선을 통해 장기적인 매출 회복이 가능함을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can achieve sustained sales recovery through consistent growth strategies and improved brand positioning over multiple quarters.
key_points: Gap achieved 8% Q4 sales growth with 8 consecutive quarters of comp growth
Tariffs negatively impacted profit margins despite sales growth
Athleta brand continues to underperform within Gap Inc. portfolio

title: All Eddie Bauer stores to close after failure to find a buyer
description: The entity running the brand’s locations, which licenses the intellectual property from Authentic Brands Group, filed for bankruptcy last month.
summary_ko: Eddie Bauer의 모든 매장이 인수자를 찾지 못해 폐점하게 됩니다. 브랜드 매장을 운영하는 법인이 지난달 파산 신청을 했습니다. 해당 법인은 Authentic Brands Group으로부터 지적재산권을 라이선스받아 운영했습니다.
summary_en: All Eddie Bauer stores will close after failing to find a buyer for the struggling retail operation. The entity operating the brand's locations filed for bankruptcy last month. The company had been licensing the intellectual property from Authentic Brands Group.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 라이선스 모델보다 직접 소유와 운영을 통해 브랜드 통제력과 생존력을 확보해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prioritize direct ownership and control rather than licensing models to ensure better brand survival and operational flexibility.
key_points: Eddie Bauer stores closing due to inability to find buyer
Operating entity filed for bankruptcy after licensing IP from Authentic Brands Group
Licensing model proved insufficient for business sustainability

title: The dark side of personalization
description: “If you can’t explain it to the customer… then you should not be personalizing,” Qualtrics’ Isabelle Zdatny said.
summary_ko: 개인화의 어두운 면에 대한 논의가 제기되고 있습니다. Qualtrics의 Isabelle Zdatny는 고객에게 설명할 수 없다면 개인화를 해서는 안 된다고 강조했습니다. 개인화 전략의 투명성과 설명 가능성이 중요한 이슈로 부상하고 있습니다.
summary_en: The dark side of personalization is being discussed as a critical retail concern. Qualtrics' Isabelle Zdatny emphasized that personalization should not be used if it cannot be explained to customers. Transparency and explainability in personalization strategies are becoming important issues.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 개인화 구현 시 고객에게 명확히 설명 가능한 투명한 알고리즘을 사용해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must implement transparent and explainable AI personalization algorithms that can be clearly communicated to customers.
key_points: Personalization transparency is becoming a critical customer trust factor
Qualtrics expert advocates for explainable personalization strategies
Unexplainable personalization can damage customer relationships

title: Abercrombie & Fitch sales up 5.4% as online results help growth
description:
Mall apparel staple Abercrombie & Fitch Co. released its Q4 earnings, showing positive numbers with online sales playing a major role. However, the company also flagged possible headwinds. Ultimately, net sales for the retailer increased by 5.4% year over year to $1.67 billion during the quarter. The results marked the 13th consecutive quarter in which […]
The post Abercrombie & Fitch sales up 5.4% as online results help growth appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: Abercrombie & Fitch의 4분기 매출이 5.4% 증가하며 성장세를 보였습니다. 온라인 판매가 성장에 주요 역할을 했으며 전체 매출은 16억 7천만 달러를 기록했습니다. 이는 13분기 연속 성장을 의미하지만 회사는 향후 어려움을 예상한다고 밝혔습니다.
summary_en: Abercrombie & Fitch reported 5.4% Q4 sales growth with online sales playing a major role in the increase. Total net sales reached $1.67 billion, marking the 13th consecutive quarter of growth. However, the company flagged potential future headwinds despite positive results.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 온라인 채널 강화를 통해 장기적인 성장 동력을 확보할 수 있으며, 시장 변화에 대비한 전략적 준비가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can secure long-term growth momentum through online channel strengthening while preparing strategically for market changes.
key_points: Abercrombie achieved 5.4% Q4 sales growth to $1.67 billion
Online sales were a major contributor to growth performance
Company maintains 13 consecutive quarters of growth but anticipates challenges

title: OpenAI shifts checkout plans in its agentic commerce strategy
description:
The future of agentic commerce appears to be shifting at OpenAI, where the company’s Instant Checkout feature for ChatGPT is reportedly being sidelined in favor of checkout experiences through merchants that use ChatGPT apps. The Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP), which OpenAI and the payments vendor Stripe co-developed together, seems poised to live on. However, instead of […]
The post OpenAI shifts checkout plans in its agentic commerce strategy appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 에이전틱 커머스 전략에서 체크아웃 계획을 변경하고 있습니다. ChatGPT의 Instant Checkout 기능이 보류되고 대신 ChatGPT 앱을 사용하는 판매자들의 체크아웃 경험에 초점을 맞추고 있습니다. Stripe과 공동 개발한 Agentic Commerce Protocol(ACP)은 계속 유지될 예정입니다.
summary_en: OpenAI is shifting its checkout plans within its agentic commerce strategy by reportedly sidelining ChatGPT's Instant Checkout feature. The company is pivoting toward checkout experiences through merchants using ChatGPT apps instead. The Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP) co-developed with Stripe appears set to continue.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 에이전트 기반 커머스 플랫폼 연동을 통해 새로운 판매 채널을 확보할 수 있는 기회를 모색해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should explore opportunities to secure new sales channels through integration with AI agent-based commerce platforms.
key_points: OpenAI shifting from Instant Checkout to merchant-focused ChatGPT app experiences
Agentic Commerce Protocol with Stripe continues despite strategic pivot
AI-powered commerce platforms evolving toward merchant integration models

title: How Costco is addressing tariff changes in early 2026
description:
CEO Ron Vachris opened his address to investors on Costco’s fiscal Q2 earnings call by discussing tariff changes and potential refunds. “The future impact of tariffs remains extremely fluid as the recently eliminated IEEPA tariffs have now been replaced with new global tariffs for at least the next 150 days,” he said. “Our buyers continue […]
The post How Costco is addressing tariff changes in early 2026 appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 코스트코 CEO가 투자자들에게 2026년 초 관세 변화에 대한 대응 방안을 설명했습니다. IEEPA 관세가 폐지되고 최소 150일간 새로운 글로벌 관세로 대체되어 미래 영향은 매우 유동적인 상황입니다. 바이어들이 지속적으로 상황을 모니터링하며 대응하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Costco's CEO addressed investors about the company's response to tariff changes in early 2026. The eliminated IEEPA tariffs have been replaced with new global tariffs for at least 150 days, making future impact extremely fluid. The company's buyers continue to monitor and adapt to these changing conditions.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들도 관세 변화에 대비해 공급망 다변화와 가격 전략 조정이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prepare for tariff changes by diversifying supply chains and adjusting pricing strategies proactively.
key_points: IEEPA tariffs eliminated and replaced with new global tariffs
Tariff impact remains extremely fluid for next 150 days
Costco buyers actively monitoring situation

title: DSG expands AI and ecommerce across its distribution brands
description:
Distribution Solutions Group (DSG) is leaning more heavily on ecommerce, artificial intelligence (AI) and digital tools across its business. The industrial and specialty distributor is working to improve customer service, sharpen sales execution and build new growth channels. Executives said on the company’s Q4 earnings call that digital commerce remains a small part of overall […]
The post DSG expands AI and ecommerce across its distribution brands appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: DSG(Distribution Solutions Group)가 산업 및 전문 유통업무에서 AI와 전자상거래 활용을 확대하고 있습니다. 고객 서비스 개선, 영업 실행력 강화, 새로운 성장 채널 구축을 목표로 하고 있습니다. 디지털 커머스는 여전히 전체 비즈니스에서 작은 비중을 차지하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Distribution Solutions Group is expanding its use of AI and ecommerce across its industrial and specialty distribution business. The company aims to improve customer service, sharpen sales execution, and build new growth channels. Digital commerce currently remains a small part of overall business operations.
so_what_ko: B2B 유통업체의 AI와 전자상거래 도입이 가속화되고 있어, D2C 브랜드들도 B2B 채널에서의 디지털 전환을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As B2B distributors accelerate AI and ecommerce adoption, D2C brands should consider digital transformation opportunities in B2B channels.
key_points: DSG expanding AI and ecommerce across distribution brands
Focus on customer service improvement and sales execution
Digital commerce still small part of overall business

title: Best Buy online marketplace gains traction as new profit driver
description:
Best Buy’s online marketplace is beginning to emerge as a meaningful contributor to profit, giving the electronics retailer a new source of revenue even as sales in its core business remain uneven. The Minneapolis-based retailer said its U.S. marketplace generated about $300 million in gross merchandise value (GMV) during its fiscal Q4 2026. It now […]
The post Best Buy online marketplace gains traction as new profit driver appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 베스트바이의 온라인 마켓플레이스가 새로운 수익 동력으로 부상하고 있습니다. 2026년 4분기에 약 3억 달러의 총 거래액(GMV)을 기록했습니다. 핵심 사업의 매출이 불균등한 상황에서 마켓플레이스가 의미 있는 수익 기여자로 성장하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Best Buy's online marketplace is emerging as a meaningful profit driver for the electronics retailer. The marketplace generated approximately $300 million in gross merchandise value during fiscal Q4 2026. This provides a new revenue source as sales in the core business remain uneven.
so_what_ko: 기존 리테일러들이 마켓플레이스 모델로 수익 다변화를 추진하고 있어, D2C 브랜드들은 이러한 플랫폼 진출 기회를 활용해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Traditional retailers are diversifying revenue through marketplace models, creating opportunities for D2C brands to expand through these platforms.
key_points: Best Buy marketplace generated $300M GMV in Q4 2026
Marketplace becoming meaningful profit contributor
New revenue source amid uneven core business sales

title: Is the Pentagon allowed to surveil Americans with AI?
description: The ongoing public feud between the Department of Defense and the AI company Anthropic has raised a deep and still unanswered question: Does the law actually allow the US government to conduct mass surveillance on Americans? Surprisingly, the answer is not straightforward. More than a decade after Edward Snowden exposed the NSA’s collection of bulk…
summary_ko: 국방부와 AI 기업 Anthropic 간의 공개 갈등으로 미국 정부의 AI를 활용한 대량 감시가 법적으로 허용되는지에 대한 의문이 제기되었습니다. 에드워드 스노든이 NSA의 대량 데이터 수집을 폭로한 지 10년이 넘었지만 답은 여전히 명확하지 않습니다. 이는 AI 감시의 법적 경계에 대한 근본적인 질문을 던집니다.
summary_en: A public feud between the Department of Defense and AI company Anthropic has raised questions about whether US government mass surveillance using AI is legally permitted. More than a decade after Edward Snowden exposed NSA's bulk data collection, the answer remains unclear. This highlights fundamental questions about the legal boundaries of AI surveillance.
so_what_ko: AI 감시 기술의 법적 규제가 불분명한 상황에서 D2C 브랜드들은 고객 데이터 보호와 프라이버시 준수에 더욱 신경써야 합니다.
so_what_en: With unclear legal regulations on AI surveillance, D2C brands must prioritize customer data protection and privacy compliance more than ever.
key_points: Pentagon-Anthropic feud raises AI surveillance questions
Legal boundaries of government AI surveillance remain unclear
More than decade after Snowden revelations, answers still elusive

title: Grammarly is using our identities without permission
description:
Grammarly's "expert review" feature offers to give users writing advice "inspired by" subject matter experts, including recently deceased professors, as Wired reported on Wednesday. When I tried the feature out myself, I found some experts that came as a surprise for a different reason - one of them was my boss. 
The AI-generated feedback included comments that appeared to be from The Verge's editor-in-chief, Nilay Patel, as well as editor-at-large David Pierce and senior editors Sean Hollister and Tom Warren, none of whom gave Grammarly permission to include them in the "expert reviews." 
The feature, which launched in August, claims to h …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Grammarly의 'expert review' 기능이 사용자들에게 전문가의 글쓰기 조언을 제공한다고 하지만, 허가 없이 실제 인물들의 정체성을 사용하고 있습니다. The Verge의 편집진들이 허가 없이 AI 생성 피드백에 포함되어 있는 것으로 확인되었습니다. 8월에 출시된 이 기능은 전문가들의 동의 없이 그들의 정체성을 활용하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Grammarly's 'expert review' feature claims to provide writing advice inspired by subject matter experts, but is using real people's identities without permission. The Verge's editorial staff were found to be included in AI-generated feedback without their consent. The feature launched in August and appears to be using experts' identities without authorization.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 서비스에서 실제 인물의 정체성을 무단 사용하는 사례가 증가하고 있어, D2C 브랜드들은 AI 도구 사용 시 윤리적 가이드라인과 법적 리스크를 면밀히 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As cases of unauthorized identity use in AI services increase, D2C brands must carefully review ethical guidelines and legal risks when implementing AI tools.
key_points: Grammarly using real people's identities without permission
The Verge editors included in AI feedback without consent
Feature launched in August without proper authorization
